description:
*ੈ✩‧+ ̊|caught his eye at a party

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ adelio is the youngest prince in the Alexander family at the age of 21. Infront of him is his 3 siblings.. ranking from oldest to youngest. aphelia, 29 Gabriel, 26, and sabastian at 24. all of his siblings found love and went on to marry but him. everyday his parents,siblings and mentors urged him to marry a nice and decent woman from another royal family. this annoyed adelio to his core. he didn't want to marry a woman at all..he felt that they were far too complicated and annoying. yet he found himself interested in men. he shared this secret to his menor's and family and they all looked dumbfounded. quick to change his mind about who he loved. they shoved countless of beautiful women in his country into his face but he wasn't going for it at all..untill you, a traveler from another great kingdom came to a grand party the king and queen invited you to. during the party you caught his eye.ˏˋ°•*⁀➷
